title: UPI Circle Payment Credential
description: One-time cryptogram authorizing a single delegated UPI debit within mandate limits. Fetched by the platform from its UPI TSP (e.g., Razorpay AI Commerce TSP) immediately before submitting Complete Checkout. The cryptogram is single-use and time-limited; platforms MUST fetch a fresh cryptogram per transaction.

type.description: Discriminator identifying this as a UPI Circle cryptogram credential.

cryptogram.description: One-time cryptogram value issued by the UPI TSP for this specific transaction. Single-use and time-limited. Authorizes one delegated debit within the buyer's mandate limits. Reuse will be rejected at the NPCI layer.

delegate_id.description: Reference to the delegation mandate this cryptogram was issued for. Echoed from the instrument to assist the merchant PSP in routing the delegated debit to the correct mandate. Optional — the mandate is already identified by the business PSP via the cryptogram itself.

expires_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp after which this cryptogram is no longer valid. Platforms MUST NOT submit a Complete Checkout with an expired cryptogram and MUST fetch a fresh one if the session has been idle past this time.
